query_title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze

recommendations.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: The four turtles travel back in time to the days of the legendary and deadly samurai in ancient Japan, where they train to perfect the art of becoming one. The turtles also assist a small village in an uprising.

recommendations.title: Turtles Forever
recommendations.overview: Whoa, dude! Worlds collide when the Turtles from one dimension meet the Turtles from another dimension! What the shell is going on? The two Turtle teams must work together to find the Technodrome and undo this multi-dimensional mess!

recommendations.title: Batman vs Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Adventure, Crime, Comedy, Action
recommendations.overview: Batman, Batgirl, and Robin forge an alliance with the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles to fight against the Turtles' sworn enemy, The Shredder, who has apparently teamed up with Ra's Al Ghul and The League of Assassins.

recommendations.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Comedy, Family
recommendations.overview: A quartet of humanoid turtles, trained by their mentor in ninjitsu, must learn to work together to face the menace of Shredder and the Foot Clan.

recommendations.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: After supervillain Shredder escapes custody, he joins forces with mad scientist Baxter Stockman and two dimwitted henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, to unleash a diabolical plan to take over the world. As the Turtles prepare to take on Shredder and his

recommendations.title: TMNT
recommendations.overview: After the defeat of their old arch nemesis, The Shredder, the Turtles have grown apart as a family. Struggling to keep them together, their rat sensei, Splinter, becomes worried when strange things begin to brew in New York City.

recommendations.title: The Red Turtle
recommendations.overview: The dialogue-less film follows the major life stages of a castaway on a deserted tropical island populated by turtles, crabs and birds.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero
recommendations.overview: The Red Ribbon Army, an evil organization that was once destroyed by Goku in the past, has been reformed by a group of people who have created new and mightier Androids, Gamma 1 and Gamma 2, and seek vengeance against Goku and his family.

recommendations.title: Finding Nemo
recommendations.overview: Nemo, an adventurous young clownfish, is unexpectedly taken from his Great Barrier Reef home to a dentist's office aquarium. It's up to his worrisome father Marlin and a friendly but forgetful fish Dory to bring Nemo home -- meeting vegetarian sharks

recommendations.title: Batman: The Dark Knight Returns, Part 2
recommendations.overview: Batman has stopped the reign of terror that The Mutants had cast upon his city.  Now an old foe wants a reunion and the government wants The Man of Steel to put a stop to Batman.
